title: Directed Graphs, Strong Components, and Condensation · Invariant Lens: Directed Dfs Times
summary: Analyze circular dependencies and group mutually reachable services. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 directed dfs times increment in a strongly-connected dependency report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use discovery and finish structure to reason about directed reachability.
Use disjoint sets for batch connectivity while recognizing unsupported deletion and path needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
